Remarks/Remarques: Curve 17.01 is a clone of Curve 17.0 but with a low end extension. Measurements surrounding the breakpoints and below were from 2020 through to the available data in 2023. There has been no recent upper end validation, as a result historical measurements from 2008-2016 were used. Despite the lack of recent data the upper end has a track record of stability, curve confidence was limited to the highest measurement from 2016 rather than those higher due to their age. The transition zone was determined by the well-defined trends in the historical QM scatter.
